overall.description: First-person cockpit view from a helicopter flying over a dense urban grid in heavy fog, transitioning to mountainous terrain with forested slopes and transmission towers on the peaks. The footage appears to be rendered in a game engine with consistently low visibility and desaturated color grading throughout.

segments.scene_description: The helicopter cockpit view shows flight instruments and a window frame as the aircraft moves over a dense urban grid shrouded in heavy fog. Below, a network of streets and buildings stretches into the distance with very limited visibility.

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from dense urban development to suburban fringe and forested mountain foothills. The urban grid fades behind as tree-covered slopes and distant mountain peaks emerge from the fog ahead.

steep terrain rising on the left side of the flight path

segments.scene_description: Flying deep within mountainous terrain, the helicopter passes over forested valleys and steep slopes. The mountains dominate the view as the aircraft navigates through the foggy ridges and valleys.

segments.scene_description: The helicopter approaches high mountain peaks where large metal transmission towers stand on the ridges. The aircraft flies closer to the towers and rocky summits as the terrain rises toward the peaks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a helicopter cockpit as it flies from a dense, fog-shrouded urban center toward a rugged mountainous wilderness. It begins with the aircraft's flight instruments and window frame visible, gliding over a sprawling grid of streets and buildings that fade into a thick, gray haze. As the helicopter moves forward, the dense urban development gradually gives way to a suburban fringe, with the city grid receding behind the aircraft. The scene then shifts toward the horizon where tree-covered slopes and distant mountain peaks emerge from the fog, finally replacing the city with a landscape of forested foothills.

The shot follows a continuous flight through a desolate mountain range that ascends from deep, forested valleys toward high, rocky summits. It begins with the helicopter navigating through dense fog, gliding over steep slopes and the dark greenery of the valley floors. As the aircraft climbs, the terrain rises sharply, shifting from the lushness of the lower ridges to the stark, jagged edges of the peaks. The scene then opens up as the camera approaches the highest elevations, where massive metal transmission towers emerge from the mist atop the ridges. Finally, the flight brings the viewer closer to these industrial structures and the barren rocky summits under a heavy, desaturated sky.
